tei:respStmt.tei:persName: Timothy L. Jackson, ed. William Drabkin

sdo:itemDesc.dc:title: Handwritten note from Oppel to Schenker, dated June 1, 1927
sdo:itemDesc.dc:description: Oppel sends Schenker the score of his a capella Mass, with a request to look at some of it and return it to him in a week.

tei:opener.tei:salute: Mein lieber Herr Schenker,Receipt of this note and its inclosure is recorded in Schenker’s diary for June 3, 1927: “Von Oppel die messe a capella u. Br., worin er um eine eilige Durchsicht bittet.” (“From Oppel, the unaccompanied Mass and letter, in which he asks me to look through it quickly”). — The note accompanied the score of Oppel’s Mass, which he had promised to send Schenker on February 14, 1927 in OJ 13/10, [41] and again on May 28 in OJ 13/10, [42].

tei:div.tei:p: durch Hindenburgs Besuch hier komme ich erst heute zur Abschickung der Messe.An a capella Mass, Oppel's main compositional project for 1926, was written in memory of his first wife, Gertrud, who had died on August 4, 1925. Schenker’s diary for June 4 records: “An Oppels Messe!” (“work on Oppel’s Mass.”). His reply is recorded in his diary for June 6 and 7: “Brief an Oppel beendet, 8 Seiten, mit vielen Vorschlägen zu Aenderungen, die ich aber sowohl für mich wie für ihn als unverbindlich erkläre.” – “An Oppel (recomm.): die Messe zurück, dazu den Brief.” (“Letter to Oppel completed, eight pages, with many suggested changes, which I, however, declare no more obligatory for me than for him.” – “To Oppel (by registered mail): the Mass returned, the letter with it”). Wenn Sie auch nicht alles ansehen, aber vielleicht Gloria, Sanctus u. Benedictus.
Wir haben noch immer kühles Wetter und Regen.
Ich wünsche Ihnen u. Ihrer lieben Frau Sonne für Pfingsten u. sende die herzlichsten Grüsse.
Because of Hindenburg’s visit here, it is only today that I am sending you my Mass. Even if you cannot look at everything, perhaps you can have a look at the Gloria, Sanctus and Benedictus.
We are still having cool weather and rain.
I wish you and your dear wife a sunny Pentecost and send my most cordial greetings
